name: Brown Breakfast Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in the order listed.
2. Select Sweet Bread or Quick Bread setting and start.
Note: This is not a yeast bread and does not rise very high. The center of this may remain doughy, but the rest is good. Alternatively, you can use 1 3/4 cups flour, 3 tablespoons honey, 3 tablespoons molasses, 6 tablespoons raisins, 2 tablespoons marmalade, and 3/4 cup milk. Spices remain unchanged. This will make a smaller loaf that is fully cooked.
